latex:
Which word change makes the question a statistical question?

How many days are there each April?

\begin{enumerate}
\item[a.] Change ``days'' to ``sunsets''
\item[b.] Change ``days'' to ``concerts''.
\item[c.] Change ``April'' to ``week''.
\item[d.] Change ``each April'' to ``this month''
\end{enumerate}
